name: asm-analysis
description: Compile -> annotate -> profile -> llm-batch pipeline for analysing and optimising assembly. Wraps simdref's annotate, profile, and llm subcommands around gcc/objdump/perf/llvm-mca; auto-detects hot loops via CFG back-edges; proposes intrinsic-level replacements with cited latency/CPI.

interface.shortDescription: Analyse generated assembly and SIMD costs
interface.longDescription: Drives the compile -> objdump -> simdref annotate -> simdref profile -> LLM-batch pipeline. Finds hot loops from perf/VTune/uProf/llvm-mca, cites latency/CPI from uops.info, and proposes intrinsic-level rewrites.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the generated assembly for this hot loop and propose SIMD-oriented optimisations.
